Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1F5A "THEDUEL-1F5A" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Duel, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $0ECB. However the true start address is $1F5A. The original source used for this game is an Italian bootleg.
